per_question.judge_notes: The agent fabricated a KEGG ID (R00001) and a PMID (xxxxxxx).
The answer correctly addresses all points of the rubric without any fabricated identifiers.

The agent provided a plan/meta-response rather than an actual answer to the question. It did not name the specific enzymes or substrates required to complete the synthesis, only outlined the strategy for how it would answer.

The answer correctly identifies precursor supply (GGPP), names the enzyme (PSY), mentions metabolic imbalance/membrane stress, suggests engineering strategies (overexpressing upstream enzymes), and contains no fabricated IDs.
The answer correctly identifies all precursors, pathways, microbial distributions, and the convergence on IPP/DMAPP. No fake IDs were used.
The answer correctly identifies pyruvate, lists glycolysis and the TCA cycle, mentions gluconeogenesis and alanine metabolism, and uses valid KEGG map IDs.
